name: AutoTrader Vehicle Listings and Market Data API
what_it_does: AutoTrader (Cox Automotive) vehicle marketplace REST API for automotive dealer listing management, vehicle market value data, and consumer car shopping experience integration. Enables AI agents to manage dealer vehicle inventory listing creation and syndication for automotive listing automation, handle vehicle price advisor and market value lookup for dealer pricing intelligence automation, access vehicle search and filtered results for car shopping experience automation, retrieve dealer lead generation and contact form submission for automotive lead management automation, manage vehicle media upload and photo management for listing quality automation, handle VIN decode and vehicle specification lookup for automotive data enrichment automation, access Kelley Blue Book value integration for trade-in and retail pricing automation, retrieve market days supply and turn rate analytics for dealer inventory analytics automation, manage dealer profile and review response for dealer reputation automation, and integrate AutoTrader with dealer management systems, CRM platforms, and automotive digital retailing tools for end-to-end automotive marketplace integration.
use_cases: Syndicating dealer inventory from listing automation agents
Pricing vehicles from market value intelligence agents
Generating leads from car shopping platform agents
Analyzing inventory turn from dealer analytics agents
not_for: Vehicle financing and loan origination (use RouteOne or Dealertrack)
Vehicle auction and wholesale remarketing (use Manheim)
best_when: An automotive dealer, dealer group, or automotive platform wanting AI agents to automate inventory listing management, market pricing analytics, lead generation, and vehicle data enrichment through AutoTrader's marketplace and Cox Automotive data ecosystem.
avoid_when: DEALER AGREEMENT REQUIRED FOR LISTING API ACCESS: AutoTrader dealer listing API requires active dealer subscription and partnership agreement; standalone API access without dealer relationship is not available; automated inventory syndication requires dealer-enrolled AutoTrader account. LISTING PHOTO QUALITY STANDARDS FOR DISPLAY: Automated vehicle photo upload via AutoTrader must meet minimum photo quality standards (resolution, background, required angles); automated photo submission failing AutoTrader quality standards creates listing demotion and reduced consumer visibility. PRICE DISPLAY ACCURACY FOR REGULATORY COMPLIANCE: Automated vehicle price display in AutoTrader listings must comply with state dealer advertising regulations (advertised price must be available, applicable fees disclosed); automated pricing with unexplained advertised price exceptions creates state dealer regulatory complaint.

auth.notes: AutoTrader uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Atlanta, Georgia HQ (Cox Automotive subsidiary). AutoTrader founded 1997. Cox Automotive acquired 2014. Part of Cox Automotive suite (VinSolutions, Kelley Blue Book, Dealertrack, Manheim). 33M+ monthly users. 3M+ vehicle listings. Price Advisor powered by KBB market data. Lead gen for 24,000+ dealer partners. VIN decode, vehicle specs, market days supply. Competes with Cars.com, CarGurus, and TrueCar for automotive marketplace.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — dealer subscription for listing access; API access with active dealer account
pricing.paid_tiers: Dealer subscription by listing count and market tier; premium placement and featured listing add-ons; API access included with dealer subscription
pricing.notes: Atlanta GA (Cox Automotive). Dealer subscription by listing volume. Premium placement add-ons. API access with active dealer subscription. 24,000+ dealer partners.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; listing and search queries throttled; webhooks for lead events

known_agent_gotchas: DEALER SUBSCRIPTION REQUIRED FOR LISTING API: AutoTrader dealer listing API requires active dealer subscription agreement; API credentials are issued per enrolled dealer account; automated inventory syndication for dealers without active AutoTrader subscription creates API authentication failure

PHOTO QUALITY VALIDATION BEFORE UPLOAD: AutoTrader listing photo quality standards require minimum resolution, white or neutral background for lead photos, and required angle coverage; automated photo submission without pre-upload quality validation creates listing demotion; implement photo quality scoring before AutoTrader upload

COX AUTOMOTIVE IDENTITY FEDERATION: AutoTrader is part of Cox Automotive suite sharing customer identity with VinSolutions, KBB, and Dealertrack; automated cross-platform customer data sync requires unified Cox Automotive identity; consumer identity mismatch between AutoTrader lead and VinSolutions CRM creates duplicate lead records

PRICE ADVISOR KBB VALUE FRESHNESS: AutoTrader Price Advisor powered by Kelley Blue Book market data updates daily; automated price recommendation using KBB API data should specify data timestamp; stale KBB value in volatile market conditions (high used car demand) creates pricing recommendation accuracy issues

ADVERTISED PRICE STATE REGULATORY COMPLIANCE: Automated vehicle price display via AutoTrader for California, New York, and other regulated states must comply with dealer advertising rules (no bait and switch, all fees disclosed, advertised price available); automated pricing without state-specific advertising compliance review creates state AG complaint and dealer license risk

LEAD RESPONSE TIME FOR AUTOTRADER LEAD SCORE: AutoTrader lead quality scoring considers dealer response time history; automated lead routing must achieve fast response (under 5 minutes for internet leads) to maintain AutoTrader dealer response time score; slow automated routing creates lead quality score degradation and consumer experience penalty
agent_readiness.security_notes: Automotive marketplace. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Consumer vehicle shopping, dealer inventory, and lead data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Automotive marketplace. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Consumer PII, vehicle listing, and dealer lead data.
